Field.Label: OASE IP Address:
Field.Description: IP address of the OASE FM-Master controller

Field.Label: Local IP Address:
Field.Description: Indigo server address reachable by the OASE controller

Field.Label: OASE Password:
Field.Description: App password used to authenticate with the controller

Field.Label: Logging:
Field.Description: Protocol debugging records raw controller traffic in Indigo's Event Log. Password authentication is redacted.
